title: Secure the Border

text:
Border security remains a top priority, with President Trump implementing tougher enforcement, closing loopholes, and restoring operational control of the southern border. In 2025, illegal crossings declined as resources were redirected to enforcement, removals accelerated, and cooperation with state and local partners expanded. These measures are protecting U.S. sovereignty and safeguarding American communities.
By prioritizing enforcement and accountability, the administration is restoring integrity to the immigration system and ensuring the law is applied consistently. These efforts protect American workers, reduce strain on local communities, and reinforce the nation’s right to control its borders and determine who enters the United States.
